name: fix-download-and-network
description: How to fix download and network problems — slow/failed downloads, stuck progress, mirror/source switching, proxy issues. Use when the user says downloads fail or hang ("下载失败","下载慢","下不动","换源","网络错误").
body:
# Fix download & network problems

Find WHERE the download breaks (source, network, proxy, disk) — most failures are
source/reachability, not bugs.

## Diagnose first
Tracked job: `job(action=list)` / `job(action=check, jobId)` — FAILED status has the
real error: 404 = file/version gone; timeout/SSL = network; "space" = disk.

## Route by symptom
| Symptom | Cause | Go to |
|---|---|---|
| search ok, install fails | wrong source | choose-source-and-verify |
| Java download stuck/fails | runtime fetch | java-runtime |
| mod update fails | stale version | mods-install (mods_update) |
| everything times out | proxy/offline | check 设置→网络 proxy; web_fetch a URL to isolate |

## Retry rule
Retry ONCE after fixing the cause. Still failing: STOP, report what was tried, the
error, and what to check (connection, VPN, disk space). Never claim success without a
tool result.

## Don't
Don't loop retries. Don't download game files via shell — use HMCL's tools instead.
